message:
fix(security): address critical bugs found in deep code review

fcp-raptorq:
- rand() div-by-zero: promote debug_assert to assert (release builds)
- decoder: checked_mul for dense matrix allocation (prevent overflow)
- decode: use try_from for k source-symbol count (prevent u32 truncation)
- received_count: saturate at u32::MAX instead of silent truncation

fcp-sandbox:
- macos: sanitize SBPL paths to prevent sandbox profile injection via
  quotes/parens in filesystem paths
- macos: remove RLIMIT_NPROC=0 which crashes async runtimes (threads
  count as processes on macOS, same as Linux NPTL)
- egress: constant-time SPKI pin comparison to prevent timing
  side-channel that could leak pin values

fcp-oauth:
- token: manual Debug impl that redacts access_token, refresh_token,
  and id_token to prevent secret leakage in logs

fcp-protocol:
- session: current_timestamp() returns 0 instead of panicking when
  system clock is before Unix epoch (containers, embedded devices)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
